productDisplayName: Skechers Women Silver White Blue Shoe
description: Ideal for running, this pair of sneakers from skechers double up as lifestyle shoes. While the soft footbed takes the natural curve of your feet, the perforated upper keep your feet fresh and clean. The lace-up system of the shoes ensure that the shoe fits sungly around and keeps your foot firm on the ground, while the highly technical outsole will accelerate your speed when on the run!UpperMesh and synthetic upper with synthetic lacingPerforated side panels with metallic side strips for cooling effectStitch accents with logo detail on the sidePadded collar and tongueToe guard lining in synthetic leatherMidsoleMidsole made of Resalyte which increases cushioning for enhanced shock absorptionOutsoleSquare lugs and horizontal ridges on the outsole to provide superior gripHigh abrasion rubber toe box embedded on the upper for shock absorptionWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
